author: pyh1107
description: Password-protect individual notes with per-file idle auto-lock. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: PAN, YUN-HUEI
manifest.description: Password-protect individual notes with per-file idle auto-lock.
manifest.name: Note Lock

name: Note Lock

releases.author: PYH1107
releases.description:
**Internal code quality improvements. No user-facing behavior changes.**

### Refactored
- Extracted password verification logic into reusable showPasswordVerification() function
- Changed autoLock setting type from string to number to match its semantic meaning
- Simplified AccessTracker API — removed methods that were not used in production code
- Removed unused passwordType parameter from ModalSetPassword
- Removed unused animations setting

releases.author: PYH1107
releases.description:
### Internationalization (i18n) Support
Note Lock now supports multiple languages! The plugin automatically detects your Obsidian language setting and displays the UI accordingly.

**Supported languages:**
1. English (default)
2. 繁體中文 (Traditional Chinese)
3. 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese)

**All user-facing text has been localized, including:**
- Settings page
- Password setup & change dialogs
- Password verification prompts
- File context menu actions (Encrypt / Decrypt)
- Notices and error messages

releases.author: PYH1107
releases.description:
### Code Quality Improve
- Removed unnecessary async/await to fix ESLint warnings
    - `fileMenuHandler.ts`: Removed redundant async from handleRemoveProtection
    - `protectionChecker.ts:` Deleted duplicate isProtected method (identical to isProtectedSync)
    - `main.ts`: Removed unnecessary async/await from requestPasswordForFile, handleOpeningProtectedFile, and related callbacks

releases.author: PYH1107
releases.description:
## v1.0.1

### Improvements
- Remove debug logging for cleaner console output
- Remove unused code

releases.author: PYH1107
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Per-file password protection via right-click menu
- SHA-256 password hashing (Web Crypto API)
- Per-file idle auto-lock
- Auto-lock on file switch
- Tab close detection
